title: wolftpm_rs_shim.c: mirrors wolfTPM internal transport dispatch
description: wolftpm-sys/src/wolftpm_rs_shim.c replicates wolfTPM's internal INTERNAL_SEND_COMMAND #ifdef chain (WOLFTPM_LINUX_DEV / WOLFTPM_LINUX_DEV_AUTODETECT / WOLFTPM_SWTPM / TIS). If wolfTPM adds a new transport, renames an internal SendCommand symbol, or changes these #ifdef guards, the shim will silently fall through to the wrong transport or fail to link. There is no single source of truth: shim.c and wolfTPM's tpm2.c must be kept in sync by hand, with no automated check.
